articles.title: Shiba Inu, MATIC to Emerge Bullish as Preparations for Monumental Network Upgrades Kick Off
articles.description: Shiba Inu, the network behind the notable meme coin SHIB, and Polygon, the network behind the MATIC token, are firing up for monumental network upgrades.

articles.title: Just 16% of Ethereum Stakers Are in Profit Ahead of Shanghai Upgrade
articles.description: With Ethereum's Shanghai upgrade slated for April, ETH stakers will finally be able to withdraw their holdings. But will they sell?

articles.title: Bitcoin (BTC) Targeting $10,000,000 Amid Rapid Global Crypto Adoption, According to Quant Analyst PlanB
articles.description: A rapid acceleration in Bitcoin’s pace of global adoption could catapult the top cryptocurrency to staggering new heights, according to quantitative analyst PlanB. In a series of tweets, the pseudonymous strategist says the most powerful part of Bitcoin’s adoption s-curve is around the corner. The adoption s-curve is often used to track the cumulative rate […]

articles.title: Did Tether falsify documents to fool cautious banks?
articles.description: A WSJ report shares how Tether allegedly falsified records and used people close to the firm in order to maintain access to banks.

articles.title: PancakeSwap V3 upgrade set to go live on BNB Chain in first week of April
articles.description: Decentralized exchange PancakeSwap is set to upgrade to its third iteration in the first week of April on the BNB Chain.
